title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at DB Schenker India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at DB Schenker India
jsonLd.description:
DB Schenker India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DB Schenker India:
DB Schenker India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DB Schenker India!
